meaning: (Lady of the) Royal Red Cross (英国)皇家护士红十字勋章(获得者)
examples: RRC configures whether or not the status prohibit function is to be used for an AM RLC entity.
When in Cell Connected state, the RRC connection mobility is handled by handover and cell update procedures.
The mapping of logical channels on transport channels depends on the multiplexing that is configured by RRC.
